Here are some additional updates regarding the Government Medical College, Mahabubnagar:

faqs.question: Which Medical fields offer the best work-life balance?
faqs.answer:
Some medical field which offe best work and life balance are shown below -
Dentistry (BDS & MDS) – Fixed clinic hours, fewer emergencies.
Pharmacy (BPharm & MPharm) – Less stress compared to hospital-based jobs.
Physiotherapy (BPT & MPT) – Flexible working hours, minimal emergency calls.
Public Health & Community Medicine – Focus on preventive healthcare rather than emergency treatments.
Clinical Research & Medical Writing – Research-based work with no direct patient responsibilities.

faqs.question: Does Government Medical College, Mahabubnagar provide good placement facilities?
faqs.answer: Government Medical College, Mahabubnagar has received an impressive review rating of 4 on Placements based on 7 feedback of verified Shiksha students.

faqs.question: What is the fee range for the courses offered at Government Medical College, Mahabubnagar?
faqs.answer: The fee bracket for programs offerred by the Government Medical College, Mahabubnagar is approximately INR 130500 - INR 225000.

A:    Government Medical College, Mahabubnagar is a well-known institution for MD, MS, MBBS courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. Government Medical College, Mahabubnagar has course specializations in Toxicology, Microbiology, Pathology, Biochemistry, Anatomy, Physiology, Obstetrics & Gynecology, Community Medicine.
faqs.question: What all specializations are provided by the courses offered at Government Medical College, Mahabubnagar?

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Good environment and great faculty.

review_content.Placements: Our college has different courses like MBBS and paramedical courses like B.Sc. agriculture lab technician etc. In our class 22 batch MBBS, there are a total of 175 students MBBS course is for 4 and half years in college and 1 year of internship in a hospital. We have a good pass percentage in our college. This year only 2 students got distinctions in our state and one is from our college in 20 batches in university exams. We can do anything after this course there are many options like teaching and all.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are 4 lecture halls for each batch with central AC. There is a library with all medical books and e library with many computers. Wi-Fi and AC hostel are also okay environment is peaceful. There are many rooms. Food in the student's mess is not so good but we can adjust. There is Vijaya Dairy where we can get all milk products. Canteen is named S zone where we can get fast food and stationery. Everything is very affordable in canteen. There is a big ground for cricket, football, and all. There is a small court for volleyball and throwball.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: It is a good college.

review_content.Placements: 100% of our batch mates got placements with a good and decent package. Our college provides 100% job security and everyone gets internships in our own hospital. We have top teachers so they teach well. They excel in their own departments so there is no tension for the quality of knowledge they provide to us.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have one of the best infrastructures in our state with high-speed Wi-Fi and projector classes. It has top-grade facilities. We have good hostels with neat and clean mess and top quality food. There is good ventilation in rooms.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Government Medical College, Mahabubnagar.

review_content.Placements: There will be no placements as like to be an engineering college. Government Medical College, Mahabubnagar, only provides internships for final-year students after completion of their Next Step 1 examination. The highest package offered in a private hospital is around 16 LPA. The lowest can be 6 LPA, and the average can be around 9 LPA. Top recruiting hospitals are Apollo Hospital, Global Hospital, and Star Hospital. 100 percent of students get into internships. Roles of a physician, diagnostic, and teacher are offered.
review_content.Infrastructure: My college is well-equipped with mind-boggling infrastructure and well-experienced and trained faculty for students. There is availability of an e-library near the pathology department. A library with all textbooks of all years is available in it. The hostel is good as it got established in 2016. Rooms are good. There will be only common bathrooms for each floor. The quality of food is the worst by Nagireddy mess. Medical facilities are provided for emergencies by PG's in the college. Sports and games are conducted on the college grounds near the faculty apartments.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: My life carver,A beautiful college life.

review_content.Placements: The MBBS course has no placements like engineering colleges. There will be only an internship after the completion of the final year. A total of 175 students are placed each year. The highest package offered after the internship can be around 12 LPA. The lowest will be 5 LPA, with an average of around 9 LPA. 100 percent of students get internships in hospital facilities. Top roles include radiology and neurosurgery.
review_content.Infrastructure: Government Medical College Mahabubnagar has good facilities for the hostel, mess, and education infrastructure. There is a facility for a library and e-library, as well as air-conditioned classrooms for the comfort of students. Lab and demo rooms for each department are available. The quality of hostel rooms is good, as the college was established in 2016. The quality of food is average, and there is no canteen on the campus. There is a ground for games.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Well satisfied with both aspects of study and life (good environment).

review_content.Placements: It is not like placements. Mostly, 95% of the students directly clear final MBBS; the remaining 4% clear the exam through supplementary exams. Overall, 99% of students enter the internship. In the internship, the minimum package is 3.12 LPA. After the internship, by completing PG, they mostly get around 15 LPA, ranging from 10-20 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: Separate lecture halls for all batches. Every department has its own labs and demo rooms. All the lecture halls are well-equipped with air conditioning. Both projectors and blackboards are available for both modes of teaching. Computer research labs are there. E-library and reading rooms are available for students. A big space for parking is also there. CCTV monitoring is provided for all lecture halls and floors.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Government Medical College, Mahabubnagar.

review_content.Placements: 175 students get admitted into college through online counseling. Average package can be 12 LPA after internship. All students of final year will get stipend through government basis as they work in government general hospital of the government, GGH Mahabnagar. There is no recruitment like in engineering here.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms and library facilities are available at the college. Hostels are good because the college is only eight years old. Sports and gaming can be seen. The quality of the food is too good and there is a good ambience in the college. There is spacious ground and more play lane to play in it. Sports are encouraged during college hours. There is no canteen in the college. There is milap near KCR Urban Park on the highway towards Jadcherla for recreational purposes.

cut_off.college_name: Government Medical College, Mahabubnagar Cutoff 2025: Check NEET UG Round Wise Ranks

description: Government Medical College, Mahabubnagar cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

Government Medical College, Mahabubnagar NEET UG cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final seat allotment result for admission to the MBBS course. The cutoff was released for several categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 21393 for MBBS admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the first and last round cutoffs 2025 for the General AI category students.

Government Medical College, Mahabubnagar MBBS cutoff 2025 was 21393 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. Similarly, for the OBC category students, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 23259 for admission to the MBBS course. Comparing both categories, the cutoff rank was more competitive for the General category students as compared to the OBC category for MBBS admission. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

Government Medical College, Mahabubnagar accepts the NEET UG entrance exam for selecting students to the MBBS course. Candidates with a valid score are then eligible for the NEET UG counselling. For 2026 admission, aspirants must refer to the table below to view some of the important NEET UG 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

Candidates preparing for admission can refer to the table below to view or download the NEET UG round and year-wise consolidated cutoff list. This will help students to understand the past three years' cutoff trends.

Government Medical College, Mahabubnagar NEET PG cutoff 2025 has been released for admission to various PG-level courses, like MD. The cutoff was released in the form of opening and closing ranks for multiple categories under the All India quota. For round 4, the closing cutoff for the General AI category was 16578. According to this range, the most competitive course is MD. For more details, see the table below.

According to the Government Medical College, Mahabubnagar MD cutoff 2025, the most sought-after specialisation for the General AI category was MD in Obstetrics and Gynaecology. The round 4 closing rank for this specialisation was 16578.
Students can refer to the table below to know NEET PG cutoffs across different categories, courses, and years.

NEET PG Counselling 2024 has been released for different categories of students. The special stray vacancy round result was the last round for NEET PG counselling. Candidates, who appeared in the counselling process can refer to the table below to view or download the consolidated year-wise NEET PG cutoff lists.

faqs.question: Can I get into WBUHS with 70% in class 12th?
faqs.answer: Yes, You can get into WBHUS with 70%marks in class 12th, As their requirement is to you have to be passed in class 12th with minimum 50% and for sc, sts with 45%. But on other hand they conduct national level entrance exams for some courses and for some courses they directly take interview and aptitude test in which you  have to be passed, you can check accordingly to your course.

A:    Candidates need to complete a minimum of Class 12 to apply for a UG course at WBUHS. The minimum aggregate for most of the UG programmes is 50%. Hence, candidates with 60% or above in Class 12 are eligible to apply for admission. There is some percentage of relaxation for reserved category candidates. However, mere fulfiling the eligibility criteria will not grant admission to candidates. They must also fulfil the selection requirements for admission.
faqs.question: Can I apply for admission at WBUHS with 60% in Class 12?

faqs.answer: A:    WBUHS offers admission to courses based on entrance-exam scores. Candidates have to qualify the entrance-exam specific to their applied course. The university considers NEET-UG, NEET-PG, NEET-SS, etc., for admission to specific courses. Besides, the university also conducts a written test to shortlist candidates.
faqs.question: Which entrance exam scores are accepted by WBUHS for admission?

faqs.answer: A:    Candidates need to fulfil the minimum required qualification and aggregate to apply for a course. The eligibility requirement is specific to each programme Below is WBUHS eligibility for top courses:CourseCommon EligibilityMBBSClass 12 with Physics, Chemistry, Biology/Biotechnology and English subjects with at least 50% aggregateBDSClass 12 with Physics, Chemistry, Biology/Biotechnology and English subjects with at least 50% aggregateBPharmClass 12 or equivalent qualification with Physics, Chemistry, Biology or Mathematics with a minimum of 50% aggregateBUMSClass 12 with Physics, Chemistry, Biology/ Biotechnology and English subjects with at least 50% aggregateMPTBPT from a recognised universityBScClass 12 in relevant subjects with at least 50% aggregateMScBachelor's degree in relevant subjects with at least 50% aggregate
faqs.question: What is the eligibility for admission to various courses at WBUHS?

faqs.answer: A:    The following entrance examination fees are accepted by West Bengal University of Health Sciences (WBUHS) for MBA programs:  Admission to UG and PG courses via NEET-UGAdmission to MD/MS/Diploma programs via NEET-PG Other entrance exams include WBJEE, CET, JEMAT, JECA, JEHOM, JELET, PGET, and GAT-B.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Oldest medical college in Asia and still number one in West Bengal, though it needs improvement.

review_content.Placements: In our batch, there are 250 students. There is no direct placement. After 4.5 years in MBBS, you work as an intern, where you receive a stipend that depends on the college in which you are posted. On average, it is nearly equal to Rs. 40,000 per month.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is average. Wi-Fi and AC are available in the library. Classrooms have AC and projectors. Labs are average, as some of the instruments become non-functional. The hostel is also average, and the girls' hostel accommodation is not proper till now. Mess and canteen food are good overall.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Follow and listen to your passion.

review_content.Placements: As this is a medical college, 100 percent got placed here, some got good placement, some got medium. The highest package offered in our college is 50 LPA. The lowest package is 30 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Apollo, Manipal, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure available in our course are free Wi-Fi, 3D labs, unlimited resources, HD classrooms, and a big library where each type of book is present. The quality of the hostel is very good, they provide double room facilities, and a clean room. Everything is nice. Food quality and quantity are both nice.

There are two types of WBUHS - The West Bengal University of Health Sciences fee components: refundable and non-refundable. To confirm their seat, candidates who made through the shortlist via the WBUHS - The West Bengal University of Health Sciences admission process must pay the course fee.

overview_faqs.question: Is WBUHS good for MBA?
overview_faqs.answer: You can study for an MBA at the West Bengal College of Health Sciences in Kolkata. The college helps students find jobs by partnering with hospitals, healthcare facilities, and research organizations. Some top employers for graduates are Apollo Hospitals, Fortis Healthcare, Medanta, and Max Healthcare, as well as the topmost organisations. WBUHS also provides job placement opportunities, and about 60% of their graduates have found employment in various industries.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fee for various courses at WBUHS?
overview_faqs.answer: West Bengal University of Health Sciences fee is a sum of various components such as tuition fee, caution deposit, etc. Candidates have to pay an admission fee to confirm their seat in the university. Below is WBUHS fee for top courses:CourseTotal Tuition FeeMBBSINR 40,500 - INR 99.1 lakhBPharmINR 4.8 lakhBUMSINR 6.8 lakhMPTINE 2.2 lakhBScINR 1.4 lakh - INR 23.4 lakhMScINR 17,800 - INR 24,000Note: This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

overview_faqs.question: How much is the application fee for admission to WBUHS?
overview_faqs.answer: Aspirants have to pay a application fee in the form of draft or challan for admission. Candidates have to pay the application fee specific to their programme. Below is the WBUHS application fee for a few courses:CourseApplication FeeMScINR 3,000BScINR 2,000

overview_faqs.question: What is the B.Pharm fee at WBUHS?
overview_faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for WBUHS BPharm is INR 4.8 lakh. This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change. The total fee of BPharm is a sum of multiple components such as caution deposit, exam fee, etc. Candidates have to register for WBJEE for BPharm course offered by WBUHS.

review_summary.college_name: WBUHS Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Review of North Bengal Medical College, Darjeeling.

content.Placements: Many students prefer to pursue PG after completion of the course. Many students get job offers. The average package offered is 7 LPA. Internships are mandatory in government hospitals. Roles offered are JR and medical officer. The private hospital offers an attractive salary.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are okay. Labs have all the required instruments and devices for practical experience. The library is also present, and it is good. Wi-Fi facility is available with limited data. There is a sports ground. Overall, it's quite good.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Physiotherapy - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: If you have many options and no financial problem, you can go to another option.

content.Placements: 40 percent of students got placed from my course. No package given, only a salary of Rs. 12000 per month. No top company hires from our college. A physiotherapist has a great role but no role in our lives. Our college could not provide any placement. Our internship does not give any salary.
content.Infrastructure: There is a library, labs, and Wi-Fi, but only for teachers. You can use the library as a student, labs are used only for practical time. There are no facilities in the hostel, hotels are used only by hospital staff and nurses. There is a canteen with only tea and coffee.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Oldest medical college in Asia and still number one in West Bengal, though it needs improvement.

content.Placements: In our batch, there are 250 students. There is no direct placement. After 4.5 years in MBBS, you work as an intern, where you receive a stipend that depends on the college in which you are posted. On average, it is nearly equal to Rs. 40,000 per month.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is average. Wi-Fi and AC are available in the library. Classrooms have AC and projectors. Labs are average, as some of the instruments become non-functional. The hostel is also average, and the girls' hostel accommodation is not proper till now. Mess and canteen food are good overall.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Follow and listen to your passion.

content.Placements: As this is a medical college, 100 percent got placed here, some got good placement, some got medium. The highest package offered in our college is 50 LPA. The lowest package is 30 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Apollo, Manipal, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure available in our course are free Wi-Fi, 3D labs, unlimited resources, HD classrooms, and a big library where each type of book is present. The quality of the hostel is very good, they provide double room facilities, and a clean room. Everything is nice. Food quality and quantity are both nice.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Really good college in WB.

content.Placements: Placements were good but not according to proper choices, as the people who were the closest to the management were given proper places. Rest of the things were good, and the salary was good. I left the job because it was far away from me. The bond penalty was Menace for 5 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Totally the best in West Bengal, and the hostel was too good. The people come here get single rooms and get bonded to each other easily. Hostels were clean but the mess food was absolute mess and better to avoid here for eating and eat outside for good.

admission_overview.college_name: WBUHS Course Admissions 2025: Fees, Eligibility, Dates & Application Process

paragraphs: WBUHS admissionsare primarily entrance-based. The university accepts national-level entrance exams such as NEET-UG, NEET-PG, etc. for specific courses.WBUHSalso conducts written tests for admission to BSc, BPT, MPT, etc. The university offers UG, PG and doctoral-level courses via affiliated colleges. The programmes are offered across various streams such as Medicine, Dental, Pharmacy, etc.
WBUHS offers programmes in full-time mode. The university offers more than 25 courses across various streams. Below are the key highlights forWBUHS admissions:
Particulars
WBUHS Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Programmes Offered
UG courses:INR 29,700 - INR 99.10 lakh
PG courses:INR 17,800 - INR 78 lakh
How to apply?
https://ruhsraj.org/ or exam-conducting body
Level of programmes offered
Popular programmes

WBUHS offers admission to courses based on their entrance exam score. The university also conducts written tests for admission to a few courses. Candidates also need to fulfil the eligibility criteria to apply for a course. Below areWBUHS coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:
*In the absence of information, data has been taken from an unofficial source. Hence, might vary.

The total fee of WBUHS is a sum of multiple components such as caution deposit, tuition fee, exam fee, etc. Candidates have to pay the admission fee to confirm their seat in the university. Some of the fee components such as caution deposit are one-time payable. Below isWBUHS feeand intake for popular courses:
Note:This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.
WBUH selection criteria are course-specific. Candidates must follow the requirements applicable to their programme for admission. Below are the steps to get a seat in WBUHS:
Step 1: WBUHS Application Process 2025

Candidates applying for MBBS and BDS have to apply for NEET. For MD, MS, aspirants have to fill out the NEET PG application form. Candidates can get the application form and the information booklet offline. Aspirants can also apply online. Aspirants have to pay an application fee to register for a course.
Step 2: Selection

WBUHS selects candidates based on national or university-level entrance exam scores. The university considers NEET-UG, NEET-PG, NEET-SS, etc. for admission to specific courses. WBUHS also conducts a written test for admission to BSc, MSc, BPT, MPT and other programmes. Further, the university releases a merit list based on the entrance exam score of the candidates.
Step 3: Counselling & Seat Allotment

For national-level entrance exams, candidates have to participate in West Bengal NEET Counselling. Aspirants who have appeared for the university entrance exam have to apply for counselling conducted by WBUHS. Selected aspirants have to pay the course fee to confirm their seat in the university.

courses_data.description: WBUHS offers four-and-a-half-year MBBS course excluding the one-year internship. The programme is offered at the UG level and is available for candidates who have qualified NEET-UG. Aspirants who have passed Class 12 with Physics, Chemistry, Biology/ Biotechnology and English subjects with at least 50% aggregate are eligible to apply for the MBBS programme.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for MBBS at WBUHS?
faqs.answer: Aspirants need to pass Class 12 with Physics, Chemistry, Biology/Biotechnology and English subjects with at least 50% aggregate to apply for West Bengal University of Health Sciences MBBS programme. Besides, Candidates must have attained the age of 17 years at the time of admission or will attain the sameby December 31of the admission year, or the last date of the year.

faqs.question: What is the cutoff for MBBS at WBUHS?
faqs.answer: WBUHS considers NEET-UG score for admission to MBBS programme. The NEET closing rank for MBBS was 8074 for General All India category. The rank saw an improving trend from 11966 in 2022 and 9672 in 2023. Aspirants must score equal or above the cutoff for admission to MBBS programme.

faqs.question: How can I get admission in MBBS at WBUHS?
faqs.answer: West Bengal University of Health Sciences offers admission to MBBS programme based on NEET-UG score. The university offers admission to 1,075 seats in MBBS course. Besides, aspirants must also pass Class 12 with Physics, Chemistry, Biology/Biotechnology and English subjects with at least 50% aggregate to apply for MBBS course.

courses_data.name: WBUHS BPharm Admission 2025
courses_data.description: WBUHS offers a four-year BPharm programme divided into eight semesters. Candidates have to qualify WBJEE for admission to 169 BPharm seats. Aspirants who have completed Class 12 or equivalent qualification with Physics, Chemistry, Biology or Mathematics with a minimum of 50% aggregate are eligible to apply for WBUHS BPharm programme.

faqs.question: What is the selection criteria for B.Pharm at WBUHS?
faqs.answer: West Bengal University of Health Sciences selects candidates for BPharm programme based on WBJEE score. Selected candidates are further offered seats via WBJEE counselling. Besides, aspirants also need to pass Class 12 or equivalent qualification with Physics, Chemistry, Biology or Mathematics with a minimum of 50% aggregate for admission to BPharm programme.

faqs.question: Which entrance exam scores are accepted by WBUHS for admission?
faqs.answer: WBUHS offers admission to courses based on entrance-exam scores. Candidates have to qualify the entrance-exam specific to their applied course. The university considers NEET-UG, NEET-PG, NEET-SS, etc., for admission to specific courses. Besides, the university also conducts a written test to shortlist candidates.

faqs.question: How can I get a seat at WBUHS?
faqs.answer: WBUHS provides admission to candidates based on national or university-level entrance exam scores. The university considers NEET-UG, NEET-PG, NEET-SS, WBJEE, etc. for admission to specific courses. WBUHS also conducts a written test for admission to BSc, MSc, BPT, MPT and other programmes. Candidates have to fulfil both eligibility and selection requirements to get a seat in the university.

faqs.question: Can I apply for admission at WBUHS with 60% in Class 12?
faqs.answer: Candidates need to complete a minimum of Class 12 to apply for a UG course at WBUHS. The minimum aggregate for most of the UG programmes is 50%. Hence, candidates with 60% or above in Class 12 are eligible to apply for admission. There is some percentage of relaxation for reserved category candidates. However, mere fulfiling the eligibility criteria will not grant admission to candidates. They must also fulfil the selection requirements for admission.

faqs.question: Can I get into WBUHS with 70% in class 12th?
faqs.answer: Yes, You can get into WBHUS with 70%marks in class 12th, As their requirement is to you have to be passed in class 12th with minimum 50% and for sc, sts with 45%. But on other hand they conduct national level entrance exams for some courses and for some courses they directly take interview and aptitude test in which you  have to be passed, you can check accordingly to your course.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by North Bengal Medical College, DarjeelingReviewed on 18 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Review of North Bengal Medical College, Darjeeling.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are okay. Labs have all the required instruments and devices for practical experience. The library is also present, and it is good. Wi-Fi facility is available with limited data. There is a sports ground. Overall, it's quite good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Vidyasagar Institute of HealthReviewed on 10 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: If you have many options and no financial problem, you can go to another option.
reviews.review_text: There is a library, labs, and Wi-Fi, but only for teachers. You can use the library as a student, labs are used only for practical time. There are no facilities in the hostel, hotels are used only by hospital staff and nurses. There is a canteen with only tea and coffee.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Medical College KolkataReviewed on 9 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Oldest medical college in Asia and still number one in West Bengal, though it needs improvement.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is average. Wi-Fi and AC are available in the library. Classrooms have AC and projectors. Labs are average, as some of the instruments become non-functional. The hostel is also average, and the girls' hostel accommodation is not proper till now. Mess and canteen food are good overall.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by North Bengal Medical College, DarjeelingReviewed on 6 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Follow and listen to your passion.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available in our course are free Wi-Fi, 3D labs, unlimited resources, HD classrooms, and a big library where each type of book is present. The quality of the hostel is very good, they provide double room facilities, and a clean room. Everything is nice. Food quality and quantity are both nice.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by ESI-PGIMSR Medical College and Hospital, JokaReviewed on 25 Oct 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Really good college in WB.
reviews.review_text: Totally the best in West Bengal, and the hostel was too good. The people come here get single rooms and get bonded to each other easily. Hostels were clean but the mess food was absolute mess and better to avoid here for eating and eat outside for good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2030Offered by Bankura Sammilani Medical CollegeReviewed on 8 Oct 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It's a great college with great teachers.
reviews.review_text: Here the course is MBBS (Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery), a great course for which a lot of students dream and do everything for it. You have to crack the NEET UG exam with a good rank for admission in this college. Here you will get college after 1st year, which is also great.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Haldia Institute of PharmacyReviewed on 9 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Almost everything is good in our college, the faculty and placements are both good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is in good condition. All facilities are available in our department. Wi-Fi is available everywhere on campus. The labs and classroom are good, and the canteen in our college is also good. Sports and games are so interesting in our college.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by International Institute of Nursing and  Research, KalyaniReviewed on 27 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: College is good for students. The teacher-student relationship is very good.
reviews.review_text: There was a very friendly atmosphere, and Warden Ma'am is too good. The food quality is average. Four-time food is provided. If any medical issue occurs, then you can go to the hospital. The hostel is beside the hospital, just 10 minutes away. The hospital's name is JNM, Kalyani.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Metropolitan Homoeopathic Medical College and HospitalReviewed on 26 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is the best private homoeopathic college in West Bengal.
reviews.review_text: All departments are available here. Now, PG will start within a few years. There is free Wi-Fi and a well-maintained library. All departments have separate labs for practicals with knowledgeable lab assistants. It has all departments like anatomy, physiology, biochemistry, organon, materia medica, etc.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by International Institute of Nursing and  Research, KalyaniReviewed on 23 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good academics and clinical training, but placements and hostel facilities can improve.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities provided for the B.Sc. nursing course at IINR are fairly well-developed and student-friendly. The institute provides Wi-Fi connectivity across the campus, which helps students access online study materials and journals. Classrooms are spacious, equipped with whiteboards and projectors.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by IQ City Medical CollegeReviewed on 17 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, supportive faculty, and healthy campus life.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure at IQ City Medical College is quite good for academics and hostel life. The classrooms are spacious with SMART boards, proper seating, and good ventilation. Labs are well-equipped for practicals, and the central library has a wide collection of medical books with Wi-Fi access and a peaceful reading hall. Hostel facilities are satisfactory, with clean rooms, attached washrooms, and decent Wi-Fi. The mess provides hygienic food, though the taste could be improved, while the canteen ...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by North Bengal Medical College, DarjeelingReviewed on 2 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The hidden gem  -  NBMC&H.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities in the academics are well built, but they lag behind in the hostel. Library is fully air conditioned and has a permanent Wi-Fi facility. The hostel is also very pockets friendly. It consists of 12 rupees per month. The campus is too huge.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2020Offered by Midnapore Medical College And HospitalReviewed on 26 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is a very affordable college for the MBBS course.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available for our course are good. The library is available with a huge collection of quality and reference books. Labs are well-equipped with instruments and equipment. The quality of the hostel is also good. Limited sports facilities are present.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by North Bengal Medical College, DarjeelingReviewed on 24 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Absolutely I am satisfied with the faculty members, college infrastructure, etc.
reviews.review_text: Campus was spread around 161 acres, one of the largest medical campuses in India. Wi-Fi and internet were available all over campus. It provided fully equipped labs for anatomy, physiology, microbiology, etc. There was a central library with huge amount of books, journals, digital resources, etc. Quality of food was good and served with hygiene.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by IQ City Medical CollegeReviewed on 24 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It has a modern campus and good clinical exposure. Overall, it is expensive.
reviews.review_text: Our college has modern air-conditioned lecture halls, digital and smart classrooms, a central library with online journals, well-equipped labs, and skill labs for clinical training. Hostels are spacious with Wi-Fi, study rooms, and common areas. The food in the mess is average but hygienic. On-campus medical care, ambulance, sports grounds, gym, and indoor games add to campus life.

college_info.college_name: Om Prakash Pandey College of Paramedical & Sciences

highlights.summary:
June 28, 2020: Admissions are OPEN for all the programmes at OPP Paramedical College. Candidates can visit the official website or the main institute to apply.

Established in 2018, Om Prakash Pandey College of Paramedical & Sciences (also known as OPP Paramedical College or OPPCPS) is one of the leading healthcare institute of Robertsganj, Sonbhadra, Uttar Pradesh. The institute has been solely designed to supply performance-oriented professionals who excel in their respective fields of the Medical Assistance and Healthcare. To tune well with the advanced medical standards, OPP College offers diploma programmes in various medical disciplines such as Nursing, Physiotherapy, Child Care, Hospital Management, Pharmacy, Orthopaedics, etc.

OPP Paramedical College became the first paramedical institute of Sonbhadra district which is self-financed by the Om Prakash Pandey Group. The institute offers several diploma and certificate programmes ranging from the course duration of three months to two years. OPP Paramedical College admission is merit-based. Candidates can apply on the official website to register for a programme or visit the main institute to take admission.

Below mentioned are some of the key facts about Om Prakash Pandey College of Paramedical and Sciences:

Om Prakash Pandey College of Paramedical & Sciences admission process is conducted through both online and offline mode. Since seats offered at the institute are limited, hence students must apply for the programmes well in advance. Admission to both Diploma and Certificate programmes is provided on first-come-first-serve basis. The application process for all the programmes begin in the first week of May. In order to apply for a programme at OPP Paramedical College, candidates can register themselves on the official website of the institute or visit the admission office of the main institute. Selection to all the programmes is merit-based only. Candidate must submit the following documents at the time of admission:

Read more: OPP Paramedical College Admission Process in detail

Om Prakash Pandey College of Paramedical & Sciences offers Diploma programmes such as Diploma in Medical Laboratory Technology (MLT), Physiotherapy, Operation Theater Technician (OTT), Nursing Assistant, Community Medical Services & Essential Drug, Multi-purpose Hospital Work, Community Medical Services & Essential Drug, Orthopedic Assistant, Medical Radiography Technology (MRT), X-ray and ECG Technology, Health and Hospital Management, Optometry, Dental Nursing, Veterinary Assistant, Dental Lab Technician, Cardiac Care, ICU Technician and Cath Lab Technician.

Additionally, the institute offers certificate programme in Child Care Education and General Duty Assistant. The course duration of all the Diploma programmes is two years, whereas certificate courses range from the course duration of three months to one year. Below mentioned are the details about the courses offered at DAITM along with eligibility criteria and course fee:

individual_reviews.course: Discontinued (Oct 2022)- M.B.A (Specialization) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: The college has poor faculty support, weak placements, and a lack of basic facilities.

content.Placements: I am pursuing an MBA (HR & Finance) from Kumaun University, batch 2023-2025. Only around 1-20 percent of students are placed with an average package of 1- 1.2 LPA and the highest at 3 LPA. Only Teach Mahindra and Sherbull visit for placements, mostly selecting marketing students.
content.Infrastructure: The department has a basic infrastructure with classrooms, Wi-Fi, and a library that is average in quality. There is no canteen, medical support, or sports and games facilities available. Hostel facilities are limited, and the mess food quality is below average.

individual_reviews.course: Discontinued (Oct 2022)- M.B.A (Specialization) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I'm satisfied with college as good faculty members and placement are available.

content.Placements: Around 70%-80% of students got placed. The highest salary package offered is 12 LPA and the lowest salary package offered is 5 LPA in our course. Recruiting companies are Tech Mahindra, ICICI Bank, etc. Around 70%- 80% of students secured internships. Roles offered are executive, analyst, finance executive, business analyst, data analytics, marketing and sales, human resources manager, etc.
content.Infrastructure: All basic facilities and infrastructure are available including labs, classrooms, and library everything is available. Hostel facility is available with good food in mess. Canteen is available with a good atmosphere. Medical facilities are available. Sports and games facilities are available with all necessary equipment.

highlights.summary:
Founded in 2013 by Mohan Lakhamraju and Hari Krishnan Nair, Great Learning is a prominent edtech company specialising in professional and higher education. It has a strong presence in over 170 countries. With the help of 1000+ faculty members and mentors, Great Learning has a learner base of more than 12.5 million students across India and some students from the Middle East, Southeast Asia, Africa, Australia, the US, and the UK.

Great Learning offers high-quality blended learning programs in trending fields like Analytics, Data Science, AI, Cloud Computing, Cybersecurity, and Business in collaboration with renowned global institutions and universities like Stanford GSB (Executive Education), Stanford Center for Professional Development, Purdue University, McCombs School of Business (UT Austin), and the Great Lakes Institute of Management and many others through blended, classroom, and online formats.

faqs.answer: Great Learning offers career assistance but please note that it doesn't guarantee job placement. They will help you with the resources to find your dream job through various means like career fairs, online job boards, career preparation sessions, networking opportunities, hackathons, and participation in live projects. With these resources, you can strengthen your resume, develop a professional network, and prepare for job interviews. Moreover, Great Learning recently acquired Superset, a leading platform for automating talent recruitment, which is said to bridge the ‘skill- gap’ for India’s talent and efficiently connect them with employers and job opportunities.
faqs.question: Q: Will I get a job after completing the course from Great Learning?

faqs.answer: Great Learning provides robust job placement support for learners of different experience levels, including fresher, early career, mid-senior level, and leadership hiring. Graduates can access resources such as resume building, interview preparation, and networking opportunities with top-tier companies. The platform focuses on aligning course content with industry requirements to ensure that learners are job-ready, often resulting in an average salary hike of 50% for successful candidates.
faqs.question: Q: What type of career support can I expect after completing a course at Great Learning?

faqs.answer: Yes, Great Learning certificates are recognised globally. The programs are developed in collaboration with prestigious universities and institutions worldwide. However, recognising Great Learning certificates globally can vary depending on the specific course and employer. Examples: MIT Data Science and Machine Learning Program: This programme is offered in collaboration with the Massachusetts Institute of Technology (MIT), a globally renowned institution for tech education. A certificate from this programme would likely be recognised by employers in the tech field. University-partnered programs: Great Learning offers programs with other prestigious universities, such as Deakin University and The University of Illinois Urbana-Champaign. Due to their affiliation, certificates from these programs are also acceptable by employers.
faqs.question: Q: Are the certificates provided by Great Learning recognised globally?

faqs.answer: Great Learning isn't a traditionally accredited university that grants its own degrees. It is a professional learning company that partners with accredited universities and institutions around the world to offer its programs. These universities and institutions hold their own accreditation, ensuring the programs meet specific quality standards. You can find details about the accrediting body for each programme on the Great Learning website or by contacting them directly.

individual_reviews.title: Review of BSA College, especially the computer science branch.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with the training and placement cell as they provide many opportunities.

content.Placements: Almost 50% of students get placed and it totally depends on students skills to get placed. Top recruiting companies like Cloudy Coders, Aptara, IquinceSoft, etc., visit the college for placements. A software developer is the role mostly offered. The highest salary package offered is 12 LPA and the lowest salary package offered is 2.6 LPA. Internships are not offered as it totally depends on students' skills.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are not so good. The library is up to the mark but Wi-Fi is uninterrupted mostly. Labs are good with air-conditioners and good computers. Computer engineers are available for students if they face any issues with any computer. The hostel is not up to the mark. It has a slow internet speed. Food is good and medical facilities are not so good. Sports and games are there as there is a huge ground but no good badminton or volleyball courts.

reviews.review_heading: The fee asked is worth it as per the faculty, campus, and placements also.
reviews.review_text: These are good as we have a library, good classrooms with AC facility, a canteen, parking space, and even a sitting area, but it could be better, as it is not as good-looking as you want for your photo sessions. There is proper space to move in a crowd when needed; the auditorium is too good, and the ground is excellent.

reviews.review_heading: Good tuition classes, best teachers, friendly environment, and the best college.
reviews.review_text: Coach department certificate with modern facilities including Wi-Fi enabled classrooms specialized labs and central to support turning classrooms of after feature technology like interactive white boards and projector while lapse are equipped with necessary hardware software and equipment for practical work libraries provided a well of physical and digital resources to supplemented course material.

reviews.review_heading: The university is very bad. The college has many restrictions like a school.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is nice, but not as good compared to other colleges. There is Wi-Fi in all departments, but the range is very poor. The library is good. Classrooms are medium, not good, and not bad. The canteen is very bad. The hostel is also medium, not good, and not bad.

reviews.review_heading: Review of BSA College, especially the computer science branch.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college BSA College of Engineering and Technology is average. It consists of different departments, labs, and workshops. The college has separate parking for students and college staff. Internet connectivity is bad according to the college Wi-Fi. In college, Wi-Fi facility is available but the speed is very slow.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the training and placement cell as they provide many opportunities.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are not so good. The library is up to the mark but Wi-Fi is uninterrupted mostly. Labs are good with air-conditioners and good computers. Computer engineers are available for students if they face any issues with any computer. The hostel is not up to the mark. It has a slow internet speed. Food is good and medical facilities are not so good. Sports and games are there as there is a huge ground but no good badminton or volleyball courts.

reviews.review_heading: The honest review of my college.
reviews.review_text: Most departments in BSA College of Engineering and Technology are in a single building. This college has an auditorium, seminar rooms, and labs for mechanical, electrical, electronics, CS, and civil departments. Games are compulsory from 2025. It has a pretty okay playground.

reviews.review_heading: The college is very nice.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is provided to every lab and class. Labs are very good, and classes are very good in terms of infrastructure, and cleaning is also very good in our college. The food in the college mess is very nice. And the college is very good at games and sports.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Electronic and Communication Engineering students by Ashish Gupta.
reviews.review_text: The facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, library, classrooms, etc., are good. The library and labs are fully air-conditioned and have a 24/7 Wi-Fi facility available for the ease of students. The hostel and mess facility are average. The sports and games facility is good, and the college has good exposure for games.

reviews.review_heading: College in the heart of Mathura.
reviews.review_text: The college campus is its main highlight. If you have a low rank and are not getting a good private college in Mathura, you can choose this college. The academics are good and teachers are well qualified. The cons of this college are the compulsory 75% attendance, and the examination is conducted very strictly, even leading to backlogs for many students.

reviews.review_heading: Do not expect much from this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college is really poor. Classes of this college feel like school. Most of the classes do not even have projectors. There are no air conditioners or coolers for classes, even in excessive heat. There are no good sports facilities; even the badminton court is outdoor and cemented.

reviews.review_heading: Take admission in this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is excellent.  .Our classrooms are well-maintained with proper AC. Wi-Fi facilities are not available in our college. Many playgrounds are available in our college. Our college has 1 canteensThe food served in the mess is okay. Wifi is not available and the library has all the books available that we need for our studies.

reviews.review_heading: Take admission in any other college which is linked with aktu
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of our college is not pretty much good it is average. The canteen is also average, food availability is not much. Good packed items was good. Sports ground is available, game lecture is also held but sometimes wifi is available in library and classes.

reviews.review_heading: BSA helps you achieve your goal and new heights.
reviews.review_text:
The hostel is not great, but the courses and teachers are.
Talking about the infrastructure, it is a small college with different departments of Bachelor of Technology on different floors of the same building. If somebody is looking for an institute that is big in size, this is surely not a place to be.
Here, a lot of emphasis is given on studies and sports, which are all dependent on the students as there are no coaches available.

reviews.review_heading: Take admission in this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good and well-maintained. The food served in the mess is good, and our classrooms are well-kept and equipped with air conditioners. However, Wi-Fi facility is not available in our college. A playground is available, and our college has two canteens.

reviews.review_heading: Good college to get a degree.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are good; Wi-Fi and AC are provided in the labs, and the classrooms are comfortable. The hostel has a good vibe and provides Wi-Fi. The support from teachers, the warden, and seniors is very good. BSACET also hosts a sports week and an annual zonal university event.

college_info.college_name: Bundelkhand Medical College: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary:
The NEET UG 2026 registration window is now closed for admission to the MBBS, BDS, and other courses. The exam is scheduled for May 3, 2026.

Here are some additional updates regarding the Bundelkhand Medical College:

reviews_list.review_title: Review of Bundelkhand Medical College.

review_content.Placements: MBBS pass out students can easily earn between Rs 60,000 per month - 1 LPA. JR salary is very less i.e Rs 55,000 per month. Salary of a senior resident is varies between Rs 65,000 per month - 1 LPA. Placements are good in this college. Pass out can easily get a job in private hospitals and can get a handsome salary.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is not good. There is just one ground at the name of campus. There is no facility on the campus for drinking water. Washrooms are not good. There is no common room for girls and boys. The gym facility is also good.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Bundelkhand Medical College is one of the best colleges in India.

review_content.Placements: There are about 100 students per batch. I am from the 2016 batch, and I am an MBBS student. I am currently awaiting the results of the pre-final year. Since it's a medical college, an internship is mandatory.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has improved a lot since I have joined. Lecture halls and libraries are fully equipped with the air-conditioned facility. Wi-Fi facility is available here. The library has a good selection of books. My floor was renovated last year, so I can't complain about the hostel. Food served in the mess is above average. Our college provides sports facilities like badminton, table tennis, cricket, football, volleyball, etc. But it definitely needs some improvement.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Good college, Needs more PG seats for ample clinical exposure!

review_content.Placements: Being a Medical College, there are no placements. Till 2018, 100 students are admitted in the UG Course. And from 2019 onwards, 125 students are admitted in the college. After the completion of 4.5 Years of MBBS there is 1 year compulsory internship for all the students to the attached hospital.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are 19 subjects in the whole MBBS course and the respective departments are present in the college as well as hospital. There is a central library and a e- library, along with AC reading room. 4 Lecture theater are present in the college for classroom lectures, all with digital aid. Separate boys and girls hostel (UG). The quality of mess food is average. The canteen is attached to the hospital and has basic food items, including tea/coffee etc. Being a medical college, the hospital is present for any emergencies with all medical facilities. As for sports and games, there are two badminton court, a football ground, a cricket ground. Table tennis, carrom and chess are also present.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Review of Bundelkhand Medical College, Sagar, Madhya Pradesh.

content.Placements: Nearly 60% of the students in my college get PG seats. In the previous NEET PG total of 4 students got AIIMS Delhi branch. Our course MBBS is of 4.5 years with 6-7 months of internship according to their batch. Good patient flow helps students to get more clinical knowledge.
content.Infrastructure: Talking about infrastructure, our college is not that big compared to other medical colleges but it has good facilities. We have central library here where students prepare for their exams, and everyone has their seat fixed. Hostel is also good compared to other medical colleges.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Review of Bundelkhand Medical College.

content.Placements: I am studying MBBS in BMC Sagar. All pass out students are placed in very well-known hospitals or government hospitals so the placements are very good. The average package offered ranges from 6 LPA to 7 LPA. All the students who passed the final year get internships.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities provided by the college are good. There is a library where you can get all the books related to your course. There is a big reading room on campus and lecture theatres are also good. There is a separate boys and girls hostel and there is a separate JR resident for PG students.

admission_overview.college_name: Bundelkhand Medical College Admission 2025: Fees, Courses, Eligibility and Selection

paragraphs: Bundelkhand Medical College admissionis through qualifying exam scores of the candidates. The institute offers courses at UG and PG levels in streams includingMedicine and Health Sciences and Nursing.Bundelkhand Medical Collegeadmission is granted based on performance of the aspirants in exams, such asNEET, NEET PG, and CBSE 12th. Candidates must register online on the institute’s website. For the offline availability of the application form, students must check with the college admission department.
Candidates have to pay a total tuition fee ofINR 4,92,000 - 5,13,000for UG and PG level. Besides tuition fee, students also need to pay caution deposit, exam fee, hostel fee, etc.
Typically, the duration of the UG level courses ranges between 66 months - 4 years.

cut_off.college_name: Bundelkhand Medical College Cutoff 2025: Check NEET UG Round Wise Ranks

description: Bundelkhand Medical College cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

Bundelkhand Medical College NEET UG cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final seat allotment result for admission to the MBBS course. The cutoff was released for several categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 15990 for MBBS admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the first and last round cutoffs 2025 for the General AI category students.

Bundelkhand Medical College MBBS cutoff 2025 was 15990 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. Similarly, for the OBC category students, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 16677 for admission to the MBBS course. Comparing both categories, the cutoff rank was more competitive for the General category students as compared to the OBC category for MBBS admission. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

Bundelkhand Medical College accepts the NEET UG entrance exam for selecting students to the MBBS course. Candidates with a valid score are then eligible for the NEET UG counselling. For 2026 admission, aspirants must refer to the table below to view some of the important NEET UG 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

Candidates preparing for admission can refer to the table below to view or download the NEET UG round and year-wise consolidated cutoff list. This will help students to understand the past three years' cutoff trends.

Bundelkhand Medical College NEET PG cutoff 2025 has been released for admission to various PG-level courses, like MD. The cutoff was released in the form of opening and closing ranks for multiple categories under the All India quota. For round 4, the closing cutoff for the General AI category was 104282. According to this range, the most competitive course is MD. For more details, see the table below.

According to the Bundelkhand Medical College MD cutoff 2025, the most sought-after specialisation for the General AI category was MD in Pharmacology. The round 4 closing rank for this specialisation was 104282.
Students can refer to the table below to know NEET PG cutoffs across different categories, courses, and years.
Students who appeared for the NEET PG exam 2025 can refer to the table below to view the NEET PG Round 1 cutoff list. They can also download the results for later use.

Bundelkhand Medical College MD cutoff 2025 was released across multiple specialisations. The cutoff was released for different categories under the Home State quota. As per the Round 2 cutoff data, the top two most competitive MD specialisations for admission were MD in General Medicine and M.S. in Ophthalmology, with MP NEET PG cutoff ranks of 3794 and 18673, respectively.

cut_off.college_name: Apollo Hospital, Orissa Cutoff 2025: Check NEET SS Round-Wise Cutoff Ranks

description: Apollo Hospital, Orissa NEET SS cutoff 2025 is out for Round 1. The NBEMS has released the NEET SS cutoff for admission to Super Speciality courses, such as DM, DNB and MCh etc. The cutoff is available for different categories under the AI quota. For the General category students under the AI quota, the NEET SS 2025 cutoff ranged between 518 and 4723, with DNB being the highly sought-after course for admission.

Apollo Hospital, Orissa DNB cutoff 2025 ranged between 518 and 4723 for the General category under the AI quota. With a lowest cutoff rank of 518, DNB in Surgical Gastroenterology turned out to be the most competitive specialisation for admission.
Students not eligible for this specialisation can also consider DNB in Genito Urinary Surgery (Urology) with a lenient first-round cutoff rank of for admission.

college_info.college_name: Faculty of Life Sciences, Kurukshetra University: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Placements, Reviews

highlights.summary: Faculty of Life Sciences, Kurukshetra University was founded in 1967. It is a public institute and is located in Kurukshetra, Haryana. Faculty of Life Sciences, Kurukshetra University courses are offered to students at the PG levels. The institute offers courses in Full Time mode. Faculty of Life Sciences, Kurukshetra University offers a total of 9 courses in stream such as Science. Some of the popular courses offered at the institute are M.Sc. and PG Diploma and the total seat intake for the available courses is 390. These courses are offered to students across several specialisations such as Biochemistry, Biotechnology, Botany, Food & Nutrition and Forensic Science. Further, the fee for all these courses ranges between INR 7,538 to 92,860 and the average median salary is around INR 3,75,000. Apart from this, the Faculty of Life Sciences, Kurukshetra University campus has a state-of-the-art infrastructure with all the advanced facilities.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: offers diverse programmes at PG level in Full Time mode. The offered programmes can be chosen from stream such as Science. At the PG level, candidates have the provision to opt from courses such as M.Sc. and PG Diploma. Faculty of Life Sciences, Kurukshetra University fee structure for all the courses is around INR 7,538 to 92,860.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.Sc. in Biochemistry - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: I have no other option to take another university.

review_content.Placements: In my course, there are no placements, and the students who are studying in my course have a very good percentage. My college didn't offer a placement cell, and they teach very best, but the placement cell is not organized. Some of the students got internships for some months, but the number of selections is not too large.
review_content.Infrastructure: The department of my college course is good, and the facilities are also good. But the problem of drinking water is from last year. The union of our college gives an application to the principal, and the dean of my college doesn't take any action about this problem. Wi-Fi connectivity is good, but it is not available all over the campus. The classrooms are good, but there is no air conditioning. In the library, there are no chairs for sitting, which is a problem.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.Sc. in Biochemistry - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Kurukshetra University has good infrastructure and facilities if you are interested.

review_content.Placements: Most people do a Ph.D. after M.Sc., but with just an M.Sc., you can be placed in companies or as a teacher with an average salary of Rs.50,000 per month. However, after a Ph.D., you can enroll in research and become a professor by passing some qualifying exams. The college itself does not get you placed.
review_content.Infrastructure: The department is small and nice. I love the lab. The Wi-Fi doesn't work, but everyone is quite good. The hostel complex is great, though. You have every facility you need within the hostel grounds. It's big, with 10-12 hostel buildings. The room and mess depend on which hostel you get. They aren't good at Saraswati Bhagwan. As for libraries, we have one in the department and a central one. The central one is large and spacious.

review_summary.college_name: Faculty of Life Sciences Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Microbiology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Master of science in microbiology.

content.Placements: All the disciplines of microbiology, the overall offers will be above 55 percent and below 80 to 85 percent. Students with more than three backlogs are not allowed to participate in the campus recruitment. The mean package offered will be above 3.20 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The thing need to be worried about in college is that they act as barriers for permitting all the students to encourage the participation in any of the tournaments or events. Only top performers are encouraged to perform all the activities. The university is enrolled with all the top resources every time.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Microbiology - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure but want reforms.

content.Placements: Packages were not the best at my university. Most of the students lost their careers and became sad, and sometimes they commit suicide. There was a lack of guidance and some facilities that we couldn't learn better like other universities in India. Some students got placed, and the highest package was 5 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Connectivity at my university was good. But sometimes college did not recharge for Wi-Fi, etc. Classrooms were good. But in summer, there was a lot of heat. There was no air-conditioned, and sometimes fans were also not on because of the lack of maintenance.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Biochemistry - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: I have no other option to take another university.

content.Placements: In my course, there are no placements, and the students who are studying in my course have a very good percentage. My college didn't offer a placement cell, and they teach very best, but the placement cell is not organized. Some of the students got internships for some months, but the number of selections is not too large.
content.Infrastructure: The department of my college course is good, and the facilities are also good. But the problem of drinking water is from last year. The union of our college gives an application to the principal, and the dean of my college doesn't take any action about this problem. Wi-Fi connectivity is good, but it is not available all over the campus. The classrooms are good, but there is no air conditioning. In the library, there are no chairs for sitting, which is a problem.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Biochemistry - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Kurukshetra University has good infrastructure and facilities if you are interested.

content.Placements: Most people do a Ph.D. after M.Sc., but with just an M.Sc., you can be placed in companies or as a teacher with an average salary of Rs.50,000 per month. However, after a Ph.D., you can enroll in research and become a professor by passing some qualifying exams. The college itself does not get you placed.
content.Infrastructure: The department is small and nice. I love the lab. The Wi-Fi doesn't work, but everyone is quite good. The hostel complex is great, though. You have every facility you need within the hostel grounds. It's big, with 10-12 hostel buildings. The room and mess depend on which hostel you get. They aren't good at Saraswati Bhagwan. As for libraries, we have one in the department and a central one. The central one is large and spacious.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Biochemistry - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: I like the overall campus of Kurukshetra University.

content.Placements: Placement is generally for students in their 3rd-year B.Sc. and final year M.Sc.; they generally get a chance to sit in campus placements. Companies visited in the college are more than 150 companies from all streams and place ratio is high for everyone. The average package given is of 2.75 LPA and the highest is 9 LPA. I want to work for a pharma company after completing my course.
content.Infrastructure: Fantastic rooms; food was 50/50, sometimes good, sometimes okay. It was affordable and of good quality. Washrooms were clean and galleries were full of noise all the time. Everything bad is banned inside the campus but students find ways to avoid authorities. Hostel Fee: INR 20,000 per year.

reviews_list.review_title: Provides an excellent balance of academics and peace.

review_content.Placements: First, after MBBS, you have to serve a bond of 2 years of rural service, which would be signed at the time of admission. review_content.Placements: Placement rate is average. Not every student gets placed, but the ones who study hard and maintain a good CGPA do get placed. A placement cell is there to help the students in getting placement from good companies. TCS and Infosys are the companies that come here.
review_content.Infrastructure: I'm studying in BCA department. Infrastructure is not good. But in recent times, especially after 2022, the management has improved the infrastructure by building new labs and classes. An entire building dedicated to B.Tech was made. Overall, students enjoy a good academic life.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: There were good placements in 2023.

review_content.Placements: 15-20% of students get placed in our course. The highest package is 9-12 LPA, and the lowest and average packages offered in our course are also in this range. TCS and start-ups are the recruiting companies for our course. 100% of students get internships from our course, with roles such as Software Engineer II.
review_content.Infrastructure: Labs are good, and the library is great for self-paced study. The classrooms are a bit good, and Wi-Fi is available in labs and the library. BCA offers us the opportunity to study and learn coding, programming languages, and computers. There is no hostel on campus, but there are hostels and PGs available nearby.

review_content.Infrastructure: My department is well-equipped with modern facilities to support both theoretical and practical learning. hostel_campus.college_name: Lachoo Memorial College of Science and Technology Infrastructure Details & Reviews

library.description: The college has a very rich library exclusively housed in a spacious area. It is computerized using SOUL, the library management software by Inflibnet, UGC. The library has more than 25000 books on various science and technology subjects including humanities and culture. Magazines, journals on special subjects and current affairs are regular features. Computers for accessing digital media add charm to the library. The book bank section in the library is established to help the needy students. The library is equipped with Xerox Machine for the benefit of teachers and students.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Volleyball Court, Table Tennis

reviews.review_heading: College life at Lachoo Memorial College of Science and Technology.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good. The cafeteria, canteen, library, ground, and everything is good. It has classrooms, along with tables, lights, and fans. Classrooms and sports facilities are really good. The food quality of the canteen is good.

reviews.review_heading: Empowering students through quality education and modern facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our campus features modern computer labs, smart classrooms, a well-stocked library, and dedicated courts for volleyball, football, basketball, and badminton. It offers a balanced environment for both academic learning and overall student development.

reviews.review_heading: Lachoo Memorial College - Jodhpur's best BCA college.
reviews.review_text: I'm studying in BCA department. Infrastructure is not good. But in recent times, especially after 2022, the management has improved the infrastructure by building new labs and classes. An entire building dedicated to B.Tech was made. Overall, students enjoy a good academic life.

reviews.review_heading: There were good placements in 2023.
reviews.review_text: Labs are good, and the library is great for self-paced study. The classrooms are a bit good, and Wi-Fi is available in labs and the library. BCA offers us the opportunity to study and learn coding, programming languages, and computers. There is no hostel on campus, but there are hostels and PGs available nearby.

reviews.review_heading: Supportive faculty and a relevant curriculum with scope for improving practical training.
reviews.review_text: My department is well-equipped with modern facilities to support both theoretical and practical learning. The canteen food is tasty and affordable, offering a variety of snacks and meals. Medical facilities are reliable, with a health center. Sports and games facilities are good. It includes playgrounds, courts, indoor games, and a gym to support physical fitness and recreation for students.

reviews.review_heading: If you want zero tension about your academics then go for it.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is average. I know about computer labs only because I have completed a BCA from this college. All the systems in the lab are in good condition but their software is too old like they have Windows 7, etc. The library is there. Quite a good library. Almost all the books are available but a few books around 2-3 books only are allowed for free.

reviews.review_heading: The environment of college.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is average. College environment is not good. It is very strict and security management is not good. College does not provide Wi-Fi facility. College only provides classrooms, lab, and library. College does not provide sports and games facilities.

reviews.review_heading: In the college, there are no placements. The faculty is good.
reviews.review_text: Labs are good. Classrooms are also good. The library is also good for study. In the library, there is a full quietness. The food of the canteen is also good. In the college, there is a sports faculty to do regular sports activities. There is no Wi-Fi here.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college for those who want to make their future bright.
reviews.review_text: There are labs, classrooms, a library, and an auditorium. No hostel is available. Good food is available in the canteen, along with first aid kits for players. All outdoor and indoor games are available. The canteen provides only vegetarian food, fast food, and healthy food, as well as shakes.

reviews.review_heading: It is an average college.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is good, with good quality and well-maintained labs. But classrooms are not well-maintained as there is no regular dusting and cleaning. Students will get access to a large central library where we will find more than 10,000 books, both curricular as well as co-curricular.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the faculty, staff, and sports.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are spacious, and we don't face any issues with the seating system. Labs are well-cleaned and have good software in the lab PCs. The Wi-Fi connection is good and fast. The library is also good; we get every book related to our course, and they don't charge us for any books. The college has most sports facilities like cricket, football, basketball, tennis, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Kinda satisfied with the PHARMA college of Rajasthan.
reviews.review_text: In our course, we are provided with labs, computer labs, and access to sports courts, including basketball and badminton courts. However, the quality of our classrooms is very poor; we don’t have enough fans in our classrooms and labs relative to their size.

reviews.review_heading: The faculty is really nice. The feels is high compared with campus and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: If you talk about infrastructure, you will not get too good and not too bad either. The campus infrastructure is some years old, established in 1964, so there are no hostel facilities available and no Wi-Fi. You will get a sports field, some sports facilities, a decent library, and labs.

reviews.review_heading: If you just want to take admission for a degree, this is for you.
reviews.review_text: The facilities provided by the college are good except for some labs. The college still uses the old systems, and the computers and software in them are the oldest versions, but they have changed some labs with the latest software and hardware. There will be no Wi-Fi, the classrooms are old with old-age chairs, and there is a library in the college that provides books for 15 days for free.

reviews.review_heading: I recommend students to take admission to this college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities provided in our college are good except for some labs. Our college uses old computers and the oldest software but they have changed some labs with the latest software and hardware. Wi-Fi is not provided. Classrooms are old with old chairs. It has a library that issues free books for 15 days.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Lachoo Memorial College of Science and Technology

likes.text: In the commerce department, companies provide many opportunities to students, Even my sister is also the topper in the science technology department in PCM.

Labs, classrooms, a library, a huge ground for sports, a good mess, and a canteen are available in our college.
