reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Pharmacy (D.Pharma.) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: The college where I will build my career.

review_content.Placements: In my college, about 70% students got placement in good companies. The highest package till now is 10 LPA, and the lowest package is about 5 LPA. This depends on the students skills. Many top companies visit the college for placement, such as Sun Pharma, NIPER, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are many labs for each of the subjects, and classes are also available for the students. The classes have a fan board, etc, that is required. Then there is a library where we can study and borrow different books. In the hostel, the quality of food is best, and the rules are strict.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Pharmacy (D.Pharma.) - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Really it is an awesome college with very helpful faculty members. Placements are very good.

review_content.Placements: From the previous batch, out of 36 students, about 30 students got placements. The average salary offered was Rs. 15,000 per month. The company which offered placements is Apollo Hospital. The role offered in our course is a pharmacist. The salary package varies as per the company, but the average salary package is 1.9 LPA. Above 90% of the students got internships from our course in Apollo Hospital.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has mainly three buildings, and one building is the college, while the other one is Indore stadium and boys common room. Last building is a girls' hostel. For practical and theory classes, there is room for students. Free Wi-Fi facility is available for all the students and faculty members. The library and computer lab are also available here. The hostel facility is so good, and the quality of the food served is also good.

admission_process.title: Pratiksha Institute of Pharmaceutical Sciences Admission Process 2025

paragraphs:
Pratiksha Institute of Pharmaceutical Sciences course admissions are done based on entrance and merit depending on the course. The university accepts applications in offline mode only. Interested students can get thePratiksha Institute of Pharmaceutical Sciencesapplication form from the university campus. The form has to be submitted along with specified documents.
Students can pursue UG programmes in fields of Medicine and Health Sciences, and more. To know about the eligibility of Pratiksha Institute of Pharmaceutical Sciences courses, students can visit the website.

Pratiksha Institute of Pharmaceutical Sciences fee structure consists of caution deposit, exam fee, hostel fee, and more. The mode of payment for Pratiksha Institute of Pharmaceutical Sciences fees is online. Interested candidates can check below for more details on Pratiksha Institute of Pharmaceutical Sciences admission:

courses_data.name: Pratiksha Institute of Pharmaceutical Sciences B.Pharma Admission 2025
courses_data.description: Pratiksha Institute of Pharmaceutical Sciencesoffers 4 yearsB.Pharma. Admission to the course is based on a valid score in CBSE 12th and AHSEC. The total tuition fee for B.Pharma isINR 5,20,000. The institute offers admission in 60 seats of B.Pharma.

courses_data.name: Pratiksha Institute of Pharmaceutical Sciences D.Pharma Admission 2025
courses_data.description: Pratiksha Institute of Pharmaceutical Sciences D.Pharmais offered to candidates at the UG level. Candidates are required to participate in the entrance-based admission process to be considered for the final admission offer. Candidates are shortlisted for the D.Pharma programme based on their performance in the entrance exam. Candidates who qualify in the admission process are eligible to secure their seat in the 2 years programme.

reviews.review_heading: The college where I will build my career.
reviews.review_text: There are many labs for each of the subjects, and classes are also available for the students. The classes have a fan board, etc, that is required. Then there is a library where we can study and borrow different books. In the hostel, the quality of food is best, and the rules are strict.

reviews.review_heading: Really it is an awesome college with very helpful faculty members. Placements are very good.
reviews.review_text: Our college has mainly three buildings, and one building is the college, while the other one is Indore stadium and boys common room. Last building is a girls' hostel. For practical and theory classes, there is room for students. Free Wi-Fi facility is available for all the students and faculty members. The library and computer lab are also available here. The hostel facility is so good, and the quality of the food served is also good.

reviews_list.batch_info: Doctor of Pharmacy (Pharm.D.) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Very good for Pharm D students.

review_content.Placements: As a Pharm D student, we don't have placements in the industry; however, our college has a tie-up with KEM Hospital in Pune, one of the most well-known hospitals in the area, for internships. For B Pharm final-year students, there are good placements available, which depend entirely on the interview process, and our faculty provides guidance for this.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure for our Pharm D course are very good, featuring clean, spacious classrooms with proper ventilation, along with a separate library dedicated to Pharm D students. The hostel is also quite good; as a resident, I can take full advantage of the amenities provided.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: It is the best college.

review_content.Placements: In our college, 50% of students are placed before completion of graduation. The average package is 3 LPA. Credence is a healthcare company. Almost 100% of students got internships from different industries like Emcure, Nulife, and Haffkin. The top role offered is AR executive.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is an LCD in every classroom experienced staff, a clean lab, different labs for different subjects, and a library also available. The food is also good the hygiene is maintained, and every day different dishes are available. Gym facilities are available 24/7. Security and medical facilities are available.

faqs.question: Q: Which Medical fields offer the best work-life balance?

faqs.answer: PES Modern College of Pharmacy (For Ladies) has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.PharmaCandidate must have studied Physics and Chemistry as compulsory subjects along with one of the Mathematics/Biology subjects with above mentioned marks in the above subjects taken together from any recognised Board/Council. The mentioned marks of SC/ST and OBC is for the candidate belonging to maharashtra State. Candidates who are appearing at the qualifying examination are also eligible. Maharashtra State candidates must have to appear for MHTCET. All India Candidates need to appear for MHTCET/NEET. However, preference shall be given to the candidate obtaining non zero positive score in NEET over the candidates who obtained non zero score in MHTCET.D.PharmaCandidate passed 10+2 (science stream) with Physics, Chemistry and Biology or Mathematics or Any other qualification approved by the Pharmacy Council of India from any recognised institute/board are eligible to applyM.PharmaFor sponsored candidates, minimum of two years of fulltime work experience in a registered firm/ company/industry/ educational and/ or research institute/ any Government Department or Government Autonomous Organization in the relevant field in which admission is being sought.

review_summary.college_name: PES Modern College of Pharmacy (For Ladies) Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Doctor of Pharmacy (Pharm.D.) - Batch of 2032
individual_reviews.title: Faculty, staff, infrastructure, facilities, and library are all good.

content.Placements: Till now, no student from this course has received an internship. I hope there will be future demand for this course because Pharma.D is a highly professional course in the healthcare field. Companies hire for roles in pharmacovigilance, regulatory affairs, medical affairs, clinical research, and drug safety.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure at our college are very well-planned. The classrooms are clean and neat, with smart classrooms, projectors, comfortable seating, and good ventilation. There are separate labs, good computer facilities, a good hostel area, and sports facilities.

individual_reviews.course: Doctor of Pharmacy (Pharm.D.) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with all the facilities, faculty members, and events.

content.Placements: Being a Pharma. D student, there will be no placement as the hospital will not come to the college and say that they need a clinical pharmacist. But the students willing to work in the industry can find placement opportunities. The placement available for B.Pharma and M.Pharma students are also made available for Doctor of Pharmacy students.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel facilities are much better. One room with four beds, 2 cupboards, 2 drawers, and 1 computer table for each student, and one shared table along with that. A shoe rack is also available. Rooms are much bigger with proper cleaning facilities. Rooms are cleaned on a daily basis. A washing machine is also available. As for food, we get morning breakfast with tea, lunch, evening snacks with tea, and dinner. Overall, the mess is better compared to nearby messes.

individual_reviews.course: Doctor of Pharmacy (Pharm.D.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Very good for Pharm D students.

content.Placements: As a Pharm D student, we don't have placements in the industry; however, our college has a tie-up with KEM Hospital in Pune, one of the most well-known hospitals in the area, for internships. For B Pharm final-year students, there are good placements available, which depend entirely on the interview process, and our faculty provides guidance for this.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure for our Pharm D course are very good, featuring clean, spacious classrooms with proper ventilation, along with a separate library dedicated to Pharm D students. The hostel is also quite good; as a resident, I can take full advantage of the amenities provided.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It is the best college.

content.Placements: In our college, 50% of students are placed before completion of graduation. The average package is 3 LPA. Credence is a healthcare company. Almost 100% of students got internships from different industries like Emcure, Nulife, and Haffkin. The top role offered is AR executive.
content.Infrastructure: There is an LCD in every classroom experienced staff, a clean lab, different labs for different subjects, and a library also available. The food is also good the hygiene is maintained, and every day different dishes are available. Gym facilities are available 24/7. Security and medical facilities are available.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Disappointing experience

content.Placements: Our college don't give placement, placement are given to only 2-3 students out of 100 students in a batch . Only 1-2 companies come in our college, College does not provide internship , if students get placement through college then Annual package of student is not more than 3-4 LPA
content.Infrastructure: College labs are not in good conditions, most of chemicals of college labs are expired , equipments of labs don't work Professor discriminate while giving marks(internals) to students , Infrastructure of hostel is very nice , hostel looks like 5 star hotel , since it is recently build , and hostel has many facilities that aren't available in normal college hostel , quality of food in hostel message is okay -okay , But hostel has not good medical facilities, otherwise hostel rooms are very nice and spacious

review_content.Placements: It's a medical course so nothing is fixed, the salary varies from hospital to hospital. 100% internships for every student and it's a compulsory The college offers roles such as junior president, senior president, and PG courses, along with clinical courses, which is a good thing.

description: Bidar Institute Of Medical Sciences cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

Bidar Institute Of Medical Sciences NEET UG cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final seat allotment result for admission to the MBBS course. The cutoff was released for several categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 26794 for MBBS admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the first and last round cutoffs 2025 for the General AI category students.

Bidar Institute Of Medical Sciences MBBS cutoff 2025 was 26794 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. Similarly, for the OBC category students, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 26959 for admission to the MBBS course. Comparing both categories, the cutoff rank was more competitive for the General category students as compared to the OBC category for MBBS admission. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

Bidar Institute Of Medical Sciences accepts the NEET UG entrance exam for selecting students to the MBBS course. Candidates with a valid score are then eligible for the NEET UG counselling. For 2026 admission, aspirants must refer to the table below to view some of the important NEET UG 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

Candidates preparing for admission can refer to the table below to view or download the NEET UG round and year-wise consolidated cutoff list. This will help students to understand the past three years' cutoff trends.

Bidar Institute Of Medical Sciences NEET PG cutoff 2025 has been released for admission to various PG-level courses, like MD and MS. The cutoff was released in the form of opening and closing ranks for multiple categories under the All India quota. For round 4, the closing cutoff for the General AI category ranged from 17127 to 143552. According to this range, the most competitive course is MD. For more details, see the table below.

According to the Bidar Institute Of Medical Sciences MD cutoff 2025, the most sought-after specialisations for the General AI category were MD in Paediatrics, followed by MD in Microbiology and MD in Physiology. The round 4 closing ranks for these specialisations were 17127, 72935 and 143552, respectively.

Students who appeared for the NEET PG exam 2025 can refer to the table below to view the NEET PG Round 1 cutoff list. They can also download the results for later use.

In this section, Bidar Institute Of Medical Sciences Karnataka NEET UG cutoff 2025 is available, alongside the last round cutoff of 2024 and 2023 for the general category students. Admission to the MBBS courses is done based on the NEET UG exam ranks, followed by the Karnataka NEET UG counselling process to avail a seat at Bidar Institute Of Medical Sciences. As per this year’s cutoff, the General Home State quota stands at a cutoff rank of 58007 for MBBS.

Bidar Institute Of Medical Sciences cutoff 2024 for MD and MS courses revealed the growing demand of specialisation preferences among the candidates belonging to different categories. Considering the Bidar Institute Of Medical Sciences MD cutoff 2024, the most popular specialisation for admission was MD in Obstetrics and Gynaecology with a closing cutoff rank of 9826 for the General AI category candidates.

reviews_list.review_title: Good college and value for money.

review_content.Placements: There are a lot of students who opt for BDS, and it has a high income rate. Internship is compulsory for this course; every dental college, including mine, has an internship program available, and almost all students enter for internship in the same college.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities are quite ordinary but efficient enough to do daily work. A lot of dental chairs don't work efficiently, but some of them do, and the hostels are fine according to the feels. Water coolers are available, and only vegetarian food is available in the mess.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: It is an affordable college.

review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good enough for the number of patients. The hostel is average. The food served in the mess is average. LT is good and equipped with an air-conditioner. All labs are available in average conditions. Wi-Fi facility is not available for students. The hostel rooms are non-air-conditioned.

review_summary.college_name: Maharaja Ganga Singh Dental College and Research Centre Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good qualifications and experience in budget-friendly dental college.

content.Placements: BDS and MS both courses are introduced here. It is a 4-year course and 1 year of internship can provide you with completion same as MS in every department 2 years and internships are provided after completion of degree. Approximately, in BDS 8 LPA package is offered. In MS depending upon the department approximately 15 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: No Wi-Fi service is provided in the hostel, but in college this facility is provided nicely. Classrooms and department conditions are good. Every day from time to time workers are present for the cleaning of every department. Water coolers are there in good condition.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: General Overview of Maharaja Ganga Singh Dental College and Research Centre.

content.Placements: Intake: 100 students. 0 packages offered. Internship: 100%. BDS and MS courses are offered here. The duration of the course is 5 years for BDS, and the duration of the MS degree is 3 years in total. You can apply for both clinical and non-clinical job sectors upon completing the course or degree.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities: Wi-Fi, smart classrooms, library, separate departments for every subject. Quality of food in the hostel: 3/10. The rest of the factors depend upon the mentality of the professors and the behavior pattern of the students in terms of teaching and understanding.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Good college and value for money.

content.Placements: There are a lot of students who opt for BDS, and it has a high income rate. Internship is compulsory for this course; every dental college, including mine, has an internship program available, and almost all students enter for internship in the same college.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are quite ordinary but efficient enough to do daily work. A lot of dental chairs don't work efficiently, but some of them do, and the hostels are fine according to the feels. Water coolers are available, and only vegetarian food is available in the mess.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It is an affordable college.

content.Placements: Our college is for dentistry, so our college doesn't provide placements for our course. Other college doesn't provide any such placements in this course. BDS tutors are appointed in some colleges. Our college provides around 1-2 jobs.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good enough for the number of patients. The hostel is average. The food served in the mess is average. LT is good and equipped with an air-conditioner. All labs are available in average conditions. Wi-Fi facility is not available for students. The hostel rooms are non-air-conditioned.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It is the best dental college in Sriganganagar with affordable fees.

content.Placements: The salary package depends on your clinical experience and practice. We have to get a master's degree. It was a medical course. We can work in hospitals and open our own clinics. Roles offered were periodontists, orthodontists, pedodontists, prosthodontists, endodontists, and oral surgeons.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure was huge, with different departments. It had classrooms and a huge library. We got good food and good rooms in the hostel, along with every facility. There was a huge ground in front of the college with courts to play basketball, football, volleyball, and badminton.

admission_process.title: Maharaja Ganga Singh Dental College and Research Centre Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Maharaja Ganga Singh Dental College and Research Centre admissionis through qualifying exam scores of the candidates. The institute offers courses at UG and PG levels in streams includingMedicine and Health Sciences.Maharaja Ganga Singh Dental College and Research Centreadmission is granted based on performance of the aspirants in exams, such asNEET, NEET MDS, and Rajasthan NEET. Candidates must register online on the institute’s website. For the offline availability of the application form, students must check with the college admission department.
Candidates have to pay a total tuition fee ofINR 5,20,000 - 19,50,000for UG and PG level. Besides tuition fee, students also need to pay caution deposit, exam fee, hostel fee, etc.
Typically, the duration of the UG level courses is 5 years.

description: Maharaja Ganga Singh Dental College and Research Centre cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

Maharaja Ganga Singh Dental College and Research Centre NEET UG cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final seat allotment result for admission to the BDS course. The cutoff was released for several categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 1190948 for BDS admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the first and last round cutoffs 2025 for the General AI category students.

Maharaja Ganga Singh Dental College and Research Centre BDS cutoff 2025 was 1190948 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. Similarly, for the OBC category students, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 1092231 for admission to the BDS course. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

Maharaja Ganga Singh Dental College and Research Centre accepts the NEET UG entrance exam for selecting students to the BDS course. Candidates with a valid score are then eligible for the NEET UG counselling. For 2026 admission, aspirants must refer to the table below to view some of the important NEET UG 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

Candidates preparing for admission can refer to the table below to view or download the NEET UG round and year-wise consolidated cutoff list. This will help students to understand the past three years' cutoff trends.
The institute accepts admission to BDS on the basis of NEET UG cutoff ranks, followed by Rajasthan NEET UG counselling.
In Round 1 the BDS Cutoff 2025 was, 1044834, whereas in Round 4 the cutoff was, 1190948 for the students belonging to the General AI category.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Maharaja Ganga Singh Dental College and Research Centre.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is not available in our college. Labs and classrooms are well-furnished. Our college has a library. The hostel is not much good. The food served in the mess is good. It provides vegetarian food items.

reviews.review_heading: College is worth it according to fees.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is awesome until you can't compare this college to other dental or medical colleges. Classes are good not AC is there but mostly theory is off. The library is here. Hostel infrastructure and hostel food are average and hostel management is below average.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure and facilities are good, but there are no extracurricular activities.
reviews.review_text: The library is air-conditioned. The classrooms are available. It has a ground for some sports like volleyball, football, badminton court, basketball etc. Every sports club is present, and the facilities of indoor games like chess, carrom, etc., are available. The college has well-equipped labs, and the labs of almost all subjects are available.

reviews.review_heading: This college is good and worth the money paid.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is average but the faculty members are good. Classrooms or lecture halls are well lit and air-conditioned. The library is also good and is up to date. Hostel facilities are also average for UG residents and good for PG residents.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Maharaja Ganga Singh Dental College and Research Centre.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is average. The hostel facility is also average. I think there is no need to expect that much from a hostel and it is average to live i.e. the there is no bad, and the environment is friendly. Students can stay there.

reviews.review_heading: The overall college is good, and results are best.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college was good, with a library that had all labs and practice rooms for each department. The mess food was average, but there was complete safety in the hostel. The cleaning in the hostel and rooms was maintained well. There were 5 water coolers.

reviews.review_heading: Could be a good option for those who scores below cut off in neet.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is average as well as the hostel. Everything related to course is available with mediocre condition. There are well maintained laboratories and classroom is also very interactive. Hostel is average. Food is we can say below average. Medical facilities are upto the mark.

reviews.review_heading: The faculty is good, but the infrastructure is average and there are no extracurricular activities.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi connection on campus. There are good facilities, but the hostel and mess are average, and the overall infrastructure is average because the college campus is not so large and there is a small canteen available.
